brand.name: PartyCart
brand.subtitle: Authentic chefs. Curated menus. Delivered to your celebration.
brand.description: No kitchen chaos. No last-minute catering stress. Just handcrafted food — delivered fresh to your party.

about.headline: What is PartyCart by Yumzy?
about.body: PartyCart is Hyderabad's first curated party catering platform — connecting hosts with the city's most authentic chefs, home kitchens, Khandani Bawarchis, and specialty culinary experts.

highlights.title: Signature Dishes
highlights.description: Iconic recipes crafted by the chefs who mastered them.

highlights.title: Regional Cuisines
highlights.description: From Mughlai to Telugu — every tradition covered.

highlights.title: Zero Vendor Chaos
highlights.description: One platform. Multiple chefs. Seamless delivery.

differentiators.headline: How We're Different
differentiators.body: Unlike regular cloud kitchens or aggregator apps, PartyCart is designed only for parties and events.

points.title: Pre-Booked Catering Orders
points.description: Curated, planned, and confirmed — no last-minute surprises.

points.title: Authentic Chef Partners
points.description: Local specialty kitchens and traditional culinary experts only.

points.title: Strict Quality Benchmarks
points.description: Hygiene, consistency, and presentation — always maintained.

points.title: End-to-End Logistics
points.description: We manage kitchen coordination, packaging, and delivery.

differentiators.cta: You focus on your guests. We take care of the food.

promise.headline: Our Promise
promise.body: Every chef and kitchen onboarded to PartyCart is rigorously vetted. We ensure uncompromising quality standards for your celebration.

pillars.title: Hygiene & Safety
pillars.description: Strict food safety standards at every kitchen.

pillars.title: Chef Professionalism
pillars.description: Reliable, experienced, and vetted culinary talent.

pillars.title: Portioning, Defined with Every Chef
pillars.description: PartyCart works with every chef to define exact portions upfront — so your guests are always well-fed, every time.

pillars.title: Premium Packaging
pillars.description: Proper portioning, presentation, and packaging always.

offerings.title: Party Boxes
offerings.description: Curated ready-to-serve meal boxes designed for intimate gatherings and small celebrations.
features: Complete balanced menus — starter to sweet
Minimal setup with zero kitchen effort needed

offerings.title: Catering Orders
offerings.description: Freshly prepared food delivered in premium hotbox trays — hot, fresh, and ready to serve the moment it arrives.
features: Hot, fresh delivery in insulated trays

offerings.title: Live Food Counters
offerings.description: Professional chefs cooking live at your event — the ultimate crowd-pleaser for any celebration.
offerings.idealFor: House parties, special occasions, and corporate events

counters.name: Kebabs & Grills
counters.description: Seekh kebabs, boti, and grilled meats cooked live on a coal sigdi — smoky aroma, charred perfection, and fresh off the grill straight to your guests.

counters.name: Podis & Ghee Rice Counter
counters.description: Aromatic ghee rice served with a spread of Andhra podis — simple, soulful, and irresistibly fragrant.

counters.name: Indo-Chinese Wok
counters.description: Live wok-tossed noodles, stir-fries, manchurias and momos — bold Indo-Chinese flavours cooked fresh at your event.

counters.name: Salad Bar
counters.description: Fresh, customisable salad stations — a refreshing addition to any party spread.

signatureCategories.title: Kebabs & Biryanis
signatureCategories.description: The heart of every Hyderabadi celebration — signature kebabs and aromatic biryanis curated for parties.
signatureCategories.note: Delivered with disposable grills so you can heat kebabs live and create an authentic experience for your guests.

items.name: Signature Kebabs
items.description: Seekh, Shami, Patta ka Gosh, Soya Chap — the classics, done right.

items.name: Party Biryanis
items.description: Dum-cooked, layered, and fragrant — served by the kilo.

items.name: Grill Experience
items.description: Disposable grills delivered — recreate the live feel at home.

signatureCategories.title: Kilo Kart
signatureCategories.description: Order everything by the kilo — the simplest way to feed a large crowd without compromise.
signatureCategories.note: Kilo Kart is perfect for large gatherings where variety and volume both matter.

signatureCategories.title: Telugu Ruchulu
signatureCategories.description: Authentic Telugu cuisine prepared by traditional Telugu chefs — the flavours of home, scaled for your celebration.

highlights.name: Traditional Recipes
highlights.description: Time-honoured family recipes passed down through generations.

highlights.name: Regional Authenticity
highlights.description: Chefs who grew up cooking these dishes — it shows in every bite.

signatureCategories.title: Rayalaseema Ruchulu
signatureCategories.description: Rustic, bold, and deeply rooted — Rayalaseema specialties brought to your party by chefs from the region.

signatureDishes.name: Ragi Sangati
signatureDishes.description: Wholesome finger millet staple — comfort food at its finest.

signatureDishes.name: Natu Kodi Pulusu
signatureDishes.description: Country chicken in a tangy, spiced gravy — intensely flavourful.

signatureDishes.name: Pulagam
signatureDishes.description: Traditional lentil and rice dish — simple, nourishing, delicious.

signatureDishes.name: Pachipulusu
signatureDishes.description: Raw tamarind rasam — a sharp, refreshing regional classic.

signatureCategories.title: Mughlai Kitchens
signatureCategories.description: Old City Khandani chefs bringing the grandeur of Mughlai cooking to your celebration.
signatureCategories.note: These are recipes perfected over generations in Hyderabad's Old City — rich, aromatic, and unmistakably royal. Biryanis served in traditional hundis for full theatrical presentation.

signatureCategories.title: Godavari Ruchulu
signatureCategories.description: Traditional Godavari-style home cooking by regional home chefs — fresh, coastal, and deeply comforting.

signatureCategories.title: Ankapur Style Chicken
signatureCategories.description: Famous Ankapur country-style chicken — cooked in authentic rural tradition over wood fire.
signatureCategories.note: Ankapur chicken is one of the most requested dishes at PartyCart events. The rustic flavour creates instant conversation.
highlights: Cooked over wood fire with local spices

signatureCategories.title: Home Kitchens
signatureCategories.description: Curated home chefs preparing specialty dishes and regional favourites with love, skill, and authenticity.

highlights.name: Regional Specialists
highlights.description: Each chef is a master of their own regional cuisine.

highlights.name: Made With Care
highlights.description: Home kitchens bring warmth and personal attention to every dish.

highlights.name: Unique Flavours
highlights.description: Dishes you won't find in any restaurant — only in PartyCart.

signatureCategories.title: Dakhni Home Chefs
signatureCategories.description: Traditional Hyderabadi Muslim home cooking — the most authentic Dakhni flavours, crafted in family kitchens.

signatureDishes.name: Nihari & Chaps
signatureDishes.description: Slow-cooked overnight — rich, gelatinous, and deeply spiced.

signatureDishes.name: Mutton Kofta
signatureDishes.description: Bold, rustic mutton preparation with deep Dakhni spice — a true crowd favourite.

signatureDishes.name: Kheema Biryani
signatureDishes.description: Minced mutton layered with fragrant rice — a hearty Dakhni classic.

signatureDishes.name: Mutton Shami
signatureDishes.description: Silky, melt-in-the-mouth mutton shami kebabs — a Dakhni classic.

signatureDishes.name: Turai Gosht
signatureDishes.description: Tender mutton slow-cooked with ridge gourd in traditional Dakhni spices.

sections.name: Corporate Bites
sections.description: Perfect for office gatherings and professional meetings.

sections.name: Daru Party Menus
sections.description: Specially curated for house parties and drinking gatherings. More appetisers. Less heavy mains. Perfectly balanced for a great evening.

signatureCategories.title: Grazing Tables & Live Kebabs
signatureCategories.description: Two of PartyCart's most visually stunning and crowd-pleasing offerings.

sections.name: Grazing Tables
sections.description: Beautifully curated grazing table setups — a feast for the eyes and the palate.

sections.name: Live Kebabs
sections.description: Freshly grilled kebabs cooked live on coal shigdi at your location. Authentic taste. Smoky aroma. Perfect party energy — guests love the experience.

signatureCategories.title: Live Coffee & Mocktail Counters
signatureCategories.description: Elevate your party experience with live beverage counters — freshly brewed, crafted on the spot, and served with flair.

sections.name: Coffee Counter
sections.description: Freshly brewed to order — the perfect companion for any celebration.

examples: Smooth, slow-steeped cold coffee served chilled

sections.name: Mocktail Counter
sections.description: Vibrant, refreshing mocktails crafted live — zero alcohol, full flavour.

examples: Fresh fruit-based drinks made to order
Guests can pick their own flavour combinations

howItWorks.headline: Ready to Plan Your Party?
howItWorks.subtext: Let PartyCart handle the food while you enjoy every moment with your guests.

steps.title: Browse & Choose
steps.description: Explore menus from Hyderabad's best chefs and kitchens.

steps.title: Customise Your Order
steps.description: Pick dishes, quantities, and delivery timing for your event.

steps.title: We Coordinate
steps.description: PartyCart manages logistics, packaging, and quality checks.

steps.title: Fresh Delivery
steps.description: Hot, authentic food arrives at your celebration — right on time.

chefOnboarding.headline: Are You a Chef? Join PartyCart
chefOnboarding.body: PartyCart is always looking for talented chefs, home cooks, and culinary specialists to join our growing platform. Bring your recipes to Hyderabad's biggest parties.

steps.title: Register
steps.description: Fill out a simple onboarding form

steps.title: Verification
steps.description: Our team reviews your profile & cuisine

steps.title: Menu Setup
steps.description: We help you list your signature dishes

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Start receiving party orders on PartyCart

app.headline: Download the App
app.description: Browse menus, book chefs, and track your order — all in one place.

footer.tagline: Hyderabad's most authentic party catering platform — bringing the city's best chefs directly to your celebration.

stats.label: Cuisine Categories
stats.description: Regional and specialty menus for every palate.

stats.label: Chef Partners
stats.description: Vetted, authentic, and passionate about food.

footer.closingLine: From intimate gatherings of 10 to grand celebrations of 500+, PartyCart delivers food made by the chefs who do it best.
